rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in the managerial-implications section, as support for a practical suggestion about mixed promotion/prevention positioning for uninvolved consumers. It is not used to build the core hypotheses, experimental design, or mediation logic of the citing paper, which relies mainly on regulatory-fit and processing-fluency literature such as Lee and Aaker (2004). The citation functions as a peripheral corroborating reference rather than a central intellectual dependency.
